title: Detailed specification: Component specs, API contracts, data models

dataFlows.name: User Message to Claude and Back
dataFlows.path: Teams -> Azure Bot Service -> Dev Tunnel -> TeamsBot -> Auth -> MessageBridge -> SessionManager -> Claude SDK -> StreamBatcher -> CardRenderer -> Teams

dataFlows.name: Claude Streaming Output
dataFlows.path: Claude SDK -> StreamBatcher (500ms/200char) -> ContentChunker -> CodeBlockRenderer -> ProactiveSender -> Teams

dataFlows.name: Code Snippet to Adaptive Card
dataFlows.path: Claude SDK -> SnippetExtractor -> LanguageMapper -> CodeBlockRenderer -> Adaptive Card -> Teams

dataFlows.name: File Upload from Teams
dataFlows.path: Teams attachment -> UploadHandler -> local disk -> SDKUserMessage -> Claude Code Read tool

dataFlows.name: MCP Bidirectional
dataFlows.path: Claude Code -> MCP tool call -> McpPlugin -> ProactiveSender -> Teams

deploymentModel.server: HTTP on port 3978 with /api/messages and /mcp endpoints
deploymentModel.state: ~/.cc-ms-teams/ with JSON config, conversation map, session map, audit log

requirements.authentication: Both Azure AD app registration AND personal access token approaches documented
requirements.deployment: Local-first, developer workstation, dev tunnel for webhook receipt

existingSolutions.composio-mcp: Composio MS Teams MCP server - reverse direction reference
existingSolutions.teams-claude-bot: Marvae/teams-claude-bot on GitHub - open source reference
existingSolutions.teams-sdk-v2-mcp: MS Teams SDK v2 native MCP support

features: Send messages from Teams to Claude Code sessions
Receive Claude Code responses in Teams (including streaming)
Share code snippets and file diffs via Adaptive Cards
File upload from Teams to local filesystem
requirements.hosting: Local machine with ngrok/dev tunnel for Teams webhook delivery
requirements.scope: Architecture specification + detailed implementation plan (no prototype)
requirements.techStack: TypeScript/Node.js, Teams SDK v2 or M365 Agents SDK, Claude Agent SDK
requirements.useCase: Full bidirectional chat - send prompts to Claude Code from Teams AND receive notifications/results back

authentication.primary: Azure AD single-tenant app registration with SSO support
authentication.requirement: All Teams bots fundamentally require some Azure registration
authentication.secondary: Webhook-only approach (limited to channels, no personal chat, no Adaptive Cards)

claudeCodeSDK.hooks: 17+ lifecycle events including Notification, PostToolUse, SessionEnd, Stop
claudeCodeSDK.primaryAPI: query() function accepting string or AsyncIterable<SDKUserMessage>
claudeCodeSDK.sessionManagement: listSessions() and getSessionMessages() for session browsing
claudeCodeSDK.streamingMode: Streaming input mode (async generator) recommended for persistent sessions
claudeCodeSDK.v2Preview: Simpler send()/stream() pattern in V2 preview

existingSolutions.claude-m365-connector: Official enterprise solution, not for custom local development
existingSolutions.composio-mcp: Reverse direction only (Claude -> Teams), being deprecated
existingSolutions.teams-claude-bot: Validates architecture but uses deprecated botbuilder v4, lacks MCP, A2A, CodeBlock

localDevelopment.devTunnels: Persistent HTTPS URLs via VS Code dev tunnels (12345.devtunnels.ms)
localDevelopment.messageFlow: Teams Service -> Azure Bot Service -> Dev Tunnel -> Local server

mitigations: User whitelist by AAD Object ID

teamsArchitecture.adaptiveCards: CodeBlock element supports 22 languages with syntax highlighting
teamsArchitecture.mcpPlugin: McpPlugin converts any App into an MCP server with tools/resources/prompts
teamsArchitecture.proactiveMessaging: app.send(conversationId, content) for async output delivery
teamsArchitecture.sdk: Teams SDK v2 (@microsoft/teams.apps) GA for TypeScript/C#

recommendations: Use Teams SDK v2 with McpPlugin, not deprecated Bot Framework SDK
Use Claude Agent SDK streaming input mode for persistent interactive sessions
Implement side-by-side diff display using ColumnSet with two CodeBlock elements
Primary auth: Azure AD single-tenant with interactive setup wizard
Default to restrictive read-only tools; require explicit opt-in for Write/Edit/Bash
Implement user whitelist by Azure AD Object ID with rate limiting
Use canUseTool callback to surface permission requests as Adaptive Cards
Bundle with esbuild for single-file deployment; provide CLI commands (setup/start/stop/status)
research.summary: Comprehensive research completed for building a bidirectional Claude Code <-> Microsoft Teams chat plugin. The ecosystem is mature: Teams SDK v2 has native MCP/A2A support, Claude Agent SDK provides streaming sessions, and an existing OSS project (teams-claude-bot) validates the architecture. The recommended stack is Teams SDK v2 App class + McpPlugin for Teams, Claude Agent SDK streaming input mode for Claude Code, and Adaptive Cards with CodeBlock for code display.
